hooks.command: COMMAND=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); MATCH=$(echo "$COMMAND" | grep -oE 'git stash|git checkout --|git restore|git reset --hard|git clean -f|schema:dump|rm -rf' | head -1); if [ -n "$MATCH" ]; then jq -n --arg reason "$MATCH is forbidden" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:$reason}}'; fi

jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:"CAVEMAN MODE ACTIVE (ultra). Abbreviate (DB/auth/config/req/res/fn/impl), strip conjunctions, arrows for causality (X → Y), one word when one word enough. Drop articles/filler/pleasantries/hedging. Fragments OK. Code/commits/security: write normal. Persist until \"stop caveman\" or \"normal mode\"."}}'

jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"UserPromptSubmit",additionalContext:"CAVEMAN MODE ACTIVE (ultra). Abbreviate (DB/auth/config/req/res/fn/impl), strip conjunctions, arrows for causality (X → Y), one word when one word enough. Drop articles/filler/pleasantries/hedging. Fragments OK. Code/commits/security: write normal."}}'
